full_text:
Sun Lin (Gongda)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Lin, styledGongda. Gained a good reputation when young, used Pan Jun not to kill the Shu family. Sun Lin was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Lin lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
